name: OpenToken.Production

access_types.name: Handle
access_types.code: type Handle is access all Instance;

subprograms.code:
function "+"
  (Tokens : in Token.Class;
   Action : in Nonterminal.Synthesize)
  return Right_Hand_Side

function "+"
  (Tokens : in Token.Class;
   Index  : in Integer)
  return Right_Hand_Side

documentation.description: Add an index used to help identify the production.

subprograms.code:
function "+"
  (Tokens : in Token_List.Instance;
   Action : in Nonterminal.Synthesize)
  return Right_Hand_Side

function "+"
  (Tokens : in Token_List.Instance;
   Index  : in Integer)
  return Right_Hand_Side

documentation.description: Add an index used to help identify the production.
A right hand side with no tokens

subprograms.name: Action
subprograms.code: function Action (Item : in Instance) return Nonterminal.Synthesize

subprograms.name: First_Token
subprograms.code: function First_Token (Item : in Instance) return Token_List.List_Iterator

subprograms.name: Index
subprograms.code: function Index (Item : in Instance) return Integer

subprograms.name: LHS
subprograms.code: function LHS (Item : in Instance) return Nonterminal.Handle

subprograms.name: LHS_ID
subprograms.code: function LHS_ID (Item : in Instance) return Token.Token_ID

formals.name: Nonterminal
formals.code: with package Nonterminal is new Token.Nonterminal (Token_List);

formals.name: Token
formals.code: with package Token is new OpenToken.Token.Enumerated (<>);

formals.name: Token_List
formals.code: with package Token_List is new Token.List;
